items.title: ‘Before coming to Parliament, dismiss Dharmendra Pradhan’: Congress to PM Modi
items.summary: Opposition refused the government’s offer of a debate on paper leaks, arguing that any discussion must be preceded by the resignation of Dharmendra Pradhan
